title: Outlook personal account
excerpt:
Hi there, 
I have a personal Outlook account and monday integrates with Outlook business account only. Anyone have found a solution to that? A way around?

posts.author: grigortopev (Grigor Topev)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I have a personal Outlook account and monday integrates with Outlook business account only. Anyone have found a solution to that? A way around?

posts.author: Malachi (Malachi Allred)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you’re referring to the Microsoft Outlook Calendar or Contacts (Online) version you can sync it with Monday.com using zzBots 1-Way or 2-Way syncs.

Here is a link: https://www.zzbots.com/integrations/microsoftoutlook/monday
